text: Transformation is a key dimension of the human spiritual experience and a central focus of the academic discipline of Christian Spirituality. Transformation refers to the process and experience of significant and lasting change occurring in an individual as they encounter Divine Reality and grow in their experience of faith and its expression. This paper focuses on transformation within the context of Biblical Spirituality following a brief introduction to this discipline. The article provides an in-depth exploration of the concept of transformation, as well as an analysis of the relationship of and the presence of transformation throughout the biblical text.
